---
title: "Week 9 --- Inference in OLS"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 9 Overview

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---|---|---|
| Lecture 1 | Hypothesis Testing | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Confidence Intervals | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | t and F Tests in Python | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |

::: {.callout-note}
Slides for this week are being prepared. Check back soon.
:::
